name: Swarming Scion
description:
Transform into a monstrous creature of the night, instantly healing to full Health.

While transformed, your Max Health, Magicka, and Stamina are increased by 10000, you heal for 15% of all damage you deal, and you can see enemies through walls. 

Bats also swarm around you and shred enemies that come close, dealing 870 Magic Damage every 1 second.
